visuals.title: exec Functions
visuals.description: Animated diagram showing exec function variants, process replacement, fork-exec pattern, naming conventions, and preserved attributes
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="400" data-topic-id="exec-functions">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bgGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E8EAF6"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#C5CAE9"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrow" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#3949AB"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="arrowGreen" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#00695C"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="arrowOrange" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#E65100"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="400" fill="url(#bgGrad)" rx="12"/>

  <!-- G1: Title (0.3s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="exec Functions in Unix System Programming">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="210" y="26" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">exec Functions</text>
    <line x1="140" y1="32" x2="280" y2="32" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </g>

  <!-- G2: Process replacement concept (1.5s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="exec replaces the current process image with a new program. The PID stays the same but code, data, and stack are replaced.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <!-- Before exec -->
    <rect x="18" y="44" width="120" height="68" rx="6" fill="#3949AB" opacity="0.12" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1.2"/>
    <text x="78" y="57" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Before exec()</text>
    <text x="78" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7.5" fill="#3949AB">PID: 1234</text>
    <rect x="28" y="76" width="100" height="12" rx="3" fill="#3949AB" opacity="0.25"/>
    <text x="78" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#fff">code | data | stack</text>
    <text x="78" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#3949AB">prog_a.c</text>
    <!-- Arrow -->
    <path d="M142 78 L165 78" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowOrange)"/>
    <text x="153" y="72" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="7" font-weight="bold" fill="#E65100">exec()</text>
    <!-- After exec -->
    <rect x="170" y="44" width="120" height="68" rx="6" fill="#00695C" opacity="0.12" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1.2"/>
    <text x="230" y="57" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#00695C">After exec()</text>
    <text x="230" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7.5" fill="#00695C">PID: 1234 (same!)</text>
    <rect x="180" y="76" width="100" height="12" rx="3" fill="#00695C" opacity="0.3"/>
    <text x="230" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#fff">NEW code|data|stack</text>
    <text x="230" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#00695C">prog_b.c</text>
    <!-- Key note -->
    <rect x="300" y="50" width="108" height="56" rx="5" fill="#C62828" opacity="0.1" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="354" y="63" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="7.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#C62828">Key Point</text>
    <text x="354" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#C62828">PID unchanged</text>
    <text x="354" y="86" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#C62828">No new process</text>
    <text x="354" y="97" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#C62828">Image replaced</text>
  </g>

  <!-- G3: Six exec variants (3.0s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="Six exec variants: execl, execv, execle, execve, execlp, execvp. Naming: l means list, v means vector, e means environment, p means PATH search.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="210" y="128" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Six exec() Variants</text>
    <!-- Row 1 -->
    <rect x="18" y="134" width="62" height="26" rx="5" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <text x="49" y="151" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="9.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#fff">execl</text>
    <rect x="88" y="134" width="62" height="26" rx="5" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <text x="119" y="151" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="9.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#fff">execv</text>
    <rect x="158" y="134" width="62" height="26" rx="5" fill="#00695C"/>
    <text x="189" y="151" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="9.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#fff">execle</text>
    <rect x="228" y="134" width="62" height="26" rx="5" fill="#00695C"/>
    <text x="259" y="151" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="9.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#fff">execve</text>
    <rect x="298" y="134" width="62" height="26" rx="5" fill="#E65100"/>
    <text x="329" y="151" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="9.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#fff">execlp</text>
    <rect x="368" y="134" width="42" height="26" rx="5" fill="#E65100"/>
    <text x="389" y="151" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#fff">execvp</text>
    <!-- Legend row -->
    <text x="49" y="172" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="6.5" fill="#3949AB">list args</text>
    <text x="119" y="172" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="6.5" fill="#3949AB">vector args</text>
    <text x="189" y="172" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="6.5" fill="#00695C">list+env</text>
    <text x="259" y="172" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="6.5" fill="#00695C">vector+env</text>
    <text x="329" y="172" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="6.5" fill="#E65100">list+PATH</text>
    <text x="389" y="172" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="6.5" fill="#E65100">vec+PATH</text>
  </g>

  <!-- G4: Naming decode table / decision tree (4.5s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="Naming decode: l vs v for argument passing style, p suffix means search PATH, e suffix means pass custom environment.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="4.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="210" y="192" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Naming Convention Decoder</text>
    <!-- Root -->
    <rect x="170" y="198" width="80" height="20" rx="4" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <text x="210" y="212" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="#fff">exec + ?</text>
    <!-- Branch: l vs v -->
    <line x1="190" y1="218" x2="120" y2="230" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1.2"/>
    <line x1="230" y1="218" x2="300" y2="230" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1.2"/>
    <rect x="80" y="230" width="80" height="18" rx="4" fill="#00695C"/>
    <text x="120" y="243" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#fff">l = list args</text>
    <rect x="260" y="230" width="84" height="18" rx="4" fill="#00695C"/>
    <text x="302" y="243" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#fff">v = vector args</text>
    <!-- Sub-branch: +p or +e -->
    <line x1="100" y1="248" x2="52" y2="258" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1"/>
    <line x1="140" y1="248" x2="165" y2="258" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1"/>
    <rect x="18" y="258" width="68" height="16" rx="3" fill="#E65100"/>
    <text x="52" y="269" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" font-weight="bold" fill="#fff">+p = PATH</text>
    <rect x="130" y="258" width="70" height="16" rx="3" fill="#C62828"/>
    <text x="165" y="269" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" font-weight="bold" fill="#fff">+e = environ</text>
    <line x1="280" y1="248" x2="248" y2="258" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1"/>
    <line x1="322" y1="248" x2="348" y2="258" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1"/>
    <rect x="214" y="258" width="68" height="16" rx="3" fill="#E65100"/>
    <text x="248" y="269" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" font-weight="bold" fill="#fff">+p = PATH</text>
    <rect x="314" y="258" width="70" height="16" rx="3" fill="#C62828"/>
    <text x="349" y="269" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" font-weight="bold" fill="#fff">+e = environ</text>
    <!-- Hint -->
    <text x="210" y="288" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="7" font-style="italic" fill="#3949AB">l: execl(path, arg0, arg1, ..., NULL) | v: execv(path, argv[])</text>
  </g>

  <!-- G5: fork-exec pattern (6.0s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="The fork-exec pattern: fork creates a child process, the child calls exec to run a new program, while the parent continues or waits.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="6.0s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="210" y="306" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">fork-exec Pattern</text>
    <!-- Parent -->
    <rect x="18" y="314" width="72" height="22" rx="5" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <text x="54" y="329" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="#fff">Parent</text>
    <!-- fork arrow -->
    <path d="M90 325 L118 325" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
    <text x="104" y="320" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6.5" fill="#3949AB">fork()</text>
    <!-- Child -->
    <rect x="122" y="314" width="64" height="22" rx="5" fill="#00695C"/>
    <text x="154" y="329" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="#fff">Child</text>
    <!-- exec arrow -->
    <path d="M186 325 L216 325" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowOrange)"/>
    <text x="201" y="320" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6.5" fill="#E65100">exec()</text>
    <!-- New program -->
    <rect x="220" y="314" width="80" height="22" rx="5" fill="#E65100"/>
    <text x="260" y="329" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#fff">New Program</text>
    <!-- Parent waits -->
    <path d="M54 336 L54 348 L320 348" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,2" fill="none"/>
    <text x="190" y="356" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#3949AB">Parent calls wait() or continues execution</text>
    <!-- exit arrow from New Program -->
    <path d="M300 325 L330 325" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
    <rect x="334" y="314" width="72" height="22" rx="5" fill="#C62828" opacity="0.15" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="370" y="329" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#C62828">exit(status)</text>
  </g>

  <!-- G6: What exec preserves (7.5s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="exec preserves: PID, PPID, real UID and GID, file descriptors unless close-on-exec is set, and default signal dispositions.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="7.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="210" y="375" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="9.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#00695C">Preserved Across exec()</text>
    <!-- Tags -->
    <rect x="14" y="381" width="50" height="14" rx="3" fill="#00695C"/>
    <text x="39" y="391" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" font-weight="bold" fill="#fff">PID</text>
    <rect x="68" y="381" width="50" height="14" rx="3" fill="#00695C"/>
    <text x="93" y="391" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" font-weight="bold" fill="#fff">PPID</text>
    <rect x="122" y="381" width="64" height="14" rx="3" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <text x="154" y="391" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" font-weight="bold" fill="#fff">Real UID</text>
    <rect x="190" y="381" width="62" height="14" rx="3" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <text x="221" y="391" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" font-weight="bold" fill="#fff">Real GID</text>
    <rect x="256" y="381" width="86" height="14" rx="3" fill="#E65100"/>
    <text x="299" y="391" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#fff">FDs (no CLOEXEC)</text>
    <rect x="346" y="381" width="64" height="14" rx="3" fill="#C62828" opacity="0.8"/>
    <text x="378" y="391" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="6.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#fff">Signals(dflt)</text>
  </g>
</svg>
